name: RNA Interference / siRNA Pathway
description: RNA interference: Dicer cleaves long double-stranded RNA into siRNAs that load into Argonaute/RISC; the passenger strand is discarded and the guide strand directs Ago2-catalyzed slicing of complementary mRNA, silencing the gene.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Long dsRNA"]
    N2["Dicer cleaves to siRNA"]
    N3["siRNA duplex (~21 nt)"]
    N4["Load into RISC (Ago)"]
    N5["Passenger strand discarded"]
    N6["Guide scans mRNA"]
    N7{"Complementary target?"}
    N8["Ago2 slices mRNA"]
    N9["mRNA degraded; silenced"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N5 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 -->|no| N6
    N7 -->|yes| N8
    N8 --> N9

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

nodeDetails.label: Dicer cleaves to siRNA
nodeDetails.detail: Dicer processes dsRNA into short duplexes

flowchartStandard.name: source_grounded_extraction_v2

notes: Source-grounded extraction (v2): node content derived from cited protocol literature with per-node provenance; topology reflects the actual procedure.

sources.title: An RNA-directed nuclease mediates post-transcriptional gene silencing in Drosophila cells
